productDisplayName: French Connection Women Beige Weave Clutch
description: Style Notefrench connection's Spring Summer bag collection indulges in a delicious "mystery materials" fest, perfectly capturing the season's vibrancy. This piece is made of paper, now that's fcuk's surprise for you! Maximize the impact of this piece with a monochrome dress and don't forget to accessorize tonally. Product DetailsBeige weave clutch with a woven design One main compartment with an inner zipped pocketFlap with a metallic clasp Material and CareShell: 100% paper, Trim: 100% polyurethane, Lining: 100% polyesterWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 17 cmWidth: 31 cm
